title: RegimeState
description: Full macro regime classification, scores, and rule-generated contextual strings for a single session checkpoint.

session.description: Session key for this regime state.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this regime state was computed.

regimeDescription.description: Human-readable description of the active regime mode.

confidence.description: Regime classification confidence as a decimal 0.0–1.0.

priorRegimeMode.description: Regime mode from the previous engine run. Null on first run.

regimeChanged.description: True if regimeMode differs from priorRegimeMode.

dominantDrivers.description: Rule-generated strings naming the top 1–3 dimension drivers.

supportingEvidence.description: Rule-generated strings describing supporting evidence across dimensions.

watchLevels.description: Rule-generated critical price/level thresholds to monitor. Max 5.

invalidationConditions.description: Rule-generated strings naming conditions that would break the current regime thesis.

RegimeScores.description: Dimension scores on an integer scale -2 (strongly negative) to +2 (strongly positive).

inflationPressure.description: Inflationary pressure score from commodities and yields.

growthHealth.description: Growth health proxy from SPX trend and VIX level.

volatilityStress.description: Volatility stress score from VIX level and change.

dollarPressure.description: Dollar direction score from DXY movement.

breadthQuality.description: Market breadth quality proxy from SPX/BTC divergence and VIX.

cryptoRiskAppetite.description: Crypto risk appetite score from BTC trend relative to SPX.
